_comment: Co-author identities for /vc:vchun-git --solo and --team flags. Format follows GitHub Co-authored-by spec. FILL IN your own identity before using --solo.

solo.name: YOUR_NAME
solo.note: Replace with your own GitHub no-reply identity. The no-reply email format ensures commits link to your GitHub profile for solo-repo Pair Extraordinaire.

team._comment: Team co-authors are prompted per-commit via --team flag, not stored here. Optionally add named teammates below for quick selection.
